outline.title: Evangelism and Discipleship
outline.summary: Welcome to Evangelism and Discipleship. Develop skills for sharing the Gospel effectively and discipling new believers. Learn proven strategies for personal evangelism and spiritual multiplication.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Overview
outline.summary: Learn to share the Gospel effectively and disciple new believers. This course develops your ability to evangelize personally and multiply disciples through intentional spiritual formation.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: What You'll Learn
outline.summary: Master Gospel presentation and personal evangelism. Learn discipleship foundations and processes. Develop skills in spiritual multiplication and mentoring. Overcome objections and build relationships.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Course Structure
outline.summary: 10 comprehensive lessons covering Gospel message, personal evangelism, evangelistic methods, overcoming objections, discipleship foundations, discipleship process, spiritual multiplication, small group discipleship, mentoring, and integration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Ready to Begin?
outline.summary: Enroll now and develop skills for sharing the Gospel and making disciples. Equip yourself to multiply disciples and see spiritual transformation in your community.
